eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Franklin; Jefferson; Lincoln; Perry; Pike; St. Charles; St. Francois; St. Louis; St. Louis; Warren; Washington, MO; at 2:28 AM on FEB 7, 2019 Effective until 6:28 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: THIS IS AN AMBER ALERT. THE FESTUS POLICE DEPARTMENT HAS ISSUED AN AMBER ALERT FOR AN INCIDENT THAT OCCURRED AT 720 DELMAR ST FESTUS AT 10 PM ON FEBRUARY 6, 2019. ABDUCTED WAS CARL COPELAND JR, WHITE MALE, 5 MONTHS. SUSPECT VEHICLE IS A BLACK 2014 FORD FOCUS, LICENSE SE9N0G. SUSPECT IS MARGARET REUTHER, WHITE FEMALE, 35, 5 FEET 2 INCHES, 110 POUNDS, BROWN HAIR, BROWN EYES, NO CLOTHING DESCRIPTION. THE VICTIM, CARL COPELAND JR, WHITE MALE, 5 MONTHS, 2 FEET, 1 INCH, 15 POUNDS, BROWN HAIR, BROWN EYES, NO CLOTHING DESCRIPTION. POSSIBLY EN ROUTE TO AN ADDRESS IN ELLISVILLE. REUTHER HAS MADE STATEMENTS THAT SHE WAS GOING TO HARM THE CHILD AND THEN HERSELF. REUTHER IS BELIEVED TO BE IN ST LOUIS AREA. If you see the suspect or vehicle, or if you have any information, immediately dial 9 1 1 to contact the nearest law enforcement agency, or contact the Festus police department at 636-937-3646.
